description_long: This is a stylized adult woman with a confident stance, arms slightly outstretched to the sides. She is dressed in a sleeveless crop top and high-waisted shorts, accessorized with layered necklaces and hoop earrings. Her footwear consists of high-heeled sandals, and she wears multiple bracelets on her wrists. The figure has a well-defined, athletic build and a distinct hairstyle with voluminous curls gathered to one side. The clothing and accessories suggest a fashionable, urban look suitable for a city environment. The model's posture and attire indicate she is ready for social or casual street settings.
description: A fashionable adult woman in a crop top, shorts, and high-heeled sandals, accessorized with jewelry and a voluminous side-swept hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crop top, shorts, layered necklaces, bracelets, and confident facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the body, and the high-heeled sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crop top, shorts, and the gathered hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, jewelry, and the side-swept curls.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless crop top, high-waisted shorts, layered necklaces, hoop earrings, bracelets
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: long voluminous curls gathered to one side
